settings.heading:
We're
Right
Here.
settings.subheading: A real person will read your message. Not a bot, not a ticket system — a person who actually cares about getting back to you.

settings.label: Real Responses
settings.sub: Every message is read and replied to by a real person on the team

settings.label: Within 24 Hours
settings.sub: Monday through Friday — we don't leave you hanging

settings.label: No Scripts
settings.sub: We'll actually read what you wrote and respond to it — not paste a template

settings.form_sub: Questions, feedback, your story, a problem with your order — anything. We want to hear it.
settings.placeholder_message: Tell us what's going on — the more detail the better, and the faster we can help.
settings.privacy_text: We'll never share your information. Reply comes directly from our team.
settings.success_body:
Thanks — a real person on our team will be with you soon.

In the meantime — if it's urgent, email us directly at hi@100CalSnacks.com
settings.email_body: Drop us a line any time. We check this constantly and reply thoughtfully — with a real answer to what you actually wrote.
settings.hours_sub: Here's when you can expect to hear from us.
settings.social_sub: DMs are open. We actually reply to those too.

settings.label: My Order
settings.helper_text: Have your order number? Add it here so we can help faster.

settings.label: Wholesale / Press
settings.helper_text: Tell us your store, outlet, or audience so we can point you to the right person.

settings.question: Where is my order?
settings.answer: Orders typically ship within 1–2 business days. You'll get a tracking email as soon as yours is on its way. If it's been more than 3 days and you haven't heard anything, email us at hi@100CalSnacks.com and we'll sort it out immediately.

settings.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.answer: If your order hasn't shipped yet, absolutely — reach out right away and we'll take care of it. Once it's shipped we can't redirect it, but we'll work with you on a solution.

settings.question: Something arrived damaged — now what?
settings.answer: We're sorry and we'll make it right, no questions asked. Email a photo to hi@100CalSnacks.com and we'll send a replacement or issue a refund — your choice.

settings.question: How do subscriptions work?
settings.answer: You can pause, skip, or cancel any time from your account — no hoops to jump through, no penalty. If you ever get stuck, just email us and we'll handle it in minutes.

settings.question: Are you available for wholesale or retail?
settings.answer: Yes — we'd love to talk. Select Wholesale / Press in the contact form above and tell us about your store or platform. We'll get back to you within one business day.

settings.question: I just want to share my story.
settings.answer: Please do. Genuinely — this brand was built from a personal story and hearing yours means everything. Select My Story in the form and write whatever you want to share. We read all of them.

settings.heading:
This Is
Personal.
settings.subheading: Every message we receive is a reminder of why this brand exists. We don't take that lightly.
